creator: gibbs@plutotech.com
text:
If you don't have the following revisions, you don't have the latest
version of the aic7xxx driver:

sys/dev/aic7xxx/aic7xxx.seq: 1.16.4.26 
sys/dev/aic7xxx/aic7xxx.reg: 1.1.4.1
sys/i386/scsi/aic7xxx.c: 1.29.2.39

If you do have the latest version of the driver, you will have to give
detailed error messages from the console as well as complete information
about your system (dmesg output works well) for me to help you.
--
Justin T. Gibbs
===========================================
  FreeBSD: Turning PCs into workstations
===========================================
